review.notes: The page contains two adjacent Sockeyes-related articles both by Elliott Pap. The draft accurately synthesizes both: (1) the 6-1 round-robin loss to Humboldt with Kurtenbach's quotes and the resulting semi-final matchup vs. Pembroke, and (2) the Bernie Lynch handshake controversy. All facts — score, record, quote, coach names, opponents — check out against the OCR. The headline in the draft is a reasonable summary rather than a verbatim pull, but there is no standalone bold headline visible in the OCR text, so this is acceptable. Byline "ELLIOTT PAP, Sun Sports Reporter" matches exactly.
